summary: iOS | FALCON | Custom Button setting is not properly refreshed after disconnecting headset from PC
scenario: Custom Button setting not refreshed after disconnecting headset from PC; still shows MS Teams as connected until app restart
description_clean: Custom Button setting is not properly refreshed after disconnecting the headset from a PC. After plugging the headset into a PC with Teams, the custom button settings are locked to Teams. When the headset is unplugged, the setting is not refreshed to reflect the change in available options — it still shows MS Teams as connected. Only restarting the app restores the ability to change the custom button to other providers.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Verify the Custom Button setting shows available options (e.g., Teams, Zoom, etc.).
4. Connect the headset to a PC running Microsoft Teams via USB or Bluetooth.
5. Observe the Custom Button setting in the app — it should now show as locked to Teams.
6. Disconnect the headset from the PC (unplug USB or disconnect Bluetooth).
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and check the Custom Button setting again.
expected: After disconnecting the headset from the PC, the Custom Button setting should refresh to show all available provider options (e.g., Teams, Zoom, etc.) and allow the user to change the assignment.
actual: After disconnecting the headset from the PC, the Custom Button setting remains locked to Teams and still shows 'MS Teams as connected'. The setting is not refreshed to reflect the change in available options. Only restarting the app restores the ability to change the custom button to other providers.
